creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
With the move from freenode to libera, we've got an opportunity to complete this consolidation. Previously, we were blocked on inconsistent .* vs -* language channel registrations and management, as well as a clear method to forward users to the right (new) channels without just +f forward which is not clear enough.

Have touched base with libera staff regarding .* channels being included in project (GC) namespaces, and they are working on a decision/response. Currently the ircd services only support #foo* and #foo-* as automatically assigned namespaces.
